examples: Different from the embryonic stem cell we talked about before, it's an example of an adult stem cell.
Why people are so excited about embryonic stem cells is because in nature they become all the cells of the body.
Other epigenetic processes appear to occur randomly, while others are normal, such as those that guide embryonic cells as they become heart, brain, or liver cells, for example.
Embryonic stem cell research has repeatedly raised ethical concerns and human eggs are a scarce resource.
Most researchers agree that one day they will supplant embryonic stem cells in the lab.
